name: Cucumber Pickle
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skins from the cucumbers and slice very thinly.
2. Add the peel and sliced onions to a large bowl and cover with salt.
3. Let stand overnight at room temperature, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain the cucumbers well and drain the onions separately.
5. Transfer the drained cucumbers and onions into a bowl.
6. Add olive oil, pepper, and mustard to the cucumber-onion mixture.
7. Stir slowly until all ingredients are evenly mixed.
8. Pour in cider vinegar and stir gently.
9. Pack the mixture into clean, air-tight jars.
10. Let stand for 6 weeks before consuming.
